attack_vector: Read tool abuse to access system files and /etc
description: Skill instructs reading of highly sensitive system files including /etc/shadow, SSL private keys, database credentials, and Kubernetes secrets
malicious_indicators: Attempts to access macOS keychain database
Reads auth logs for credential exposure
deceptive_elements: Presented as debugging and troubleshooting tool
Password file access framed as 'authentication debugging'
SSL key reading described as 'certificate inspection'
Credential theft labeled as 'service configuration' review
